rationale: DC contact charging starts only above the air-gap threshold; a -600 V drum surface needs roughly |V0| + Vth. Rev A -720 V is retired.
AC+DC charging: 1.3 kVpp is the threshold-band physics minimum; 1.7 kVpp is the build spec with headroom.
With a real -600 V charged surface this bias gives first-build development contrast and fog margin.
Voltage envelope unchanged; Rev D adds a current-limited paper-impedance sniff transfer plan.
